docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED JAN-26-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACEY, RONISHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,490.12 FILED BY FINNERTY, CARMEL AS TO DEFENDANT MACEY, RONISHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CARMEL FINNERTY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RONISHA MACEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MACEY, RONISHA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINNERTY, CARMEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACEY, RONISHA $4,287.58 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,337.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
